title: Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 2027
action: Placed on the Union Calendar, Calendar No. 567.

title: Flight 293 Remembrance Act
action: Referred to the Subcommittee on Disability Assistance and Memorial Affairs.

title: Veterans Border Patrol Training Act
action: Referred to the Subcommittee on Economic Opportunity.

title: Preventing the Abuse of Immigration Parole Act
action: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.

title: Ensuring Safe and Toxic-Free Foods Act of 2025
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.

title: End the Vaccine Carveout Act
action: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.

title: Equal Health Care for All Act
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions. (Sponsor introductory remarks on measure: CR S4458)

title: AID Youth Employment Act
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions. (text: CR S1926-1930)

title: Federal Program Integrity and Fraud Prevention Act of 2025
action: Ordered to be Reported (Amended) by the Yeas and Nays: 38 - 2.

title: Women’s Health Protection Act of 2025
action: Referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, and in addition to the Committee on the Judiciary, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.

title: Protecting America's Drinking Water from Extreme Temperatures Act of 2026
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Environment and Public Works.

title: FED UP with Bleeding Disorders Act of 2026
action: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.

title: Government Audit and Accountability of Federally Funded State-Administered Programs Act
action: Ordered to be Reported (Amended) by the Yeas and Nays: 41 - 0.

title: Constance C. McDaniel Medically Necessary Infant Formula and Donor Milk Act
action: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.

title: GUARD Act
action: Referred to the Committee on the Judiciary, and in addition to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.

title: Concurrent Care for Comfort Act
action: Referred to the Committee on Ways and Means, and in addition to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.

title: CIRCUIT Act
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Finance.

title: A bill to amend chapters 83 and 84 of title 5, United States Code, to authorize an increase of the retirement age for members of the Capitol Police.
action: Became Public Law No: 119-95.

title: A resolution amending rule XXXVII of the Standing Rules of the Senate to prohibit Senators from trading on prediction markets.
action: Resolution agreed to in Senate with amendments by Unanimous Consent.

title: A resolution honoring the life of Dirk Arthur Kempthorne, former United States Senator for the State of Idaho.
action: Submitted in the Senate, considered, and agreed to without amendment and with a preamble by Unanimous Consent. (consideration: CR S2205; text: CR S2203)
